endpoints.name: Survival archetype cohort (Duskmourn improvised-weapon survivors and their tools)

description: Savior of the Small carries two of the cohort node's three membership signals printed verbatim: a Creature - Kor Survivor type-line and a Survival ability-word trigger in oracle text. The node's own Caveats section already named 'Savior of the Small' as a cohort-eligible member awaiting acquisition - so this is the graph cashing a check it wrote itself. One clean stack attach onto an existing designer-coordinated cohort. No card-to-card edge: Wizards (Tabak mechanics article + Rosewater design diaries) designed Survival as a unit, the anchor exists, the card points at it. The only sigh is that Savior is typed Kor Survivor not Human Survivor - which is actually a feature, it gives the cohort its first non-Human and first graveyard-recursion Survival member, the caretaker-survivor pole next to Defiant's fight and Norin's flight.
citations: [Scryfall: type_line Creature - Kor Survivor; oracle_text 'Survival - At the beginning of your second main phase...']
[Wizards of the Coast: Matt Tabak, 'Duskmourn Mechanics,' 2024-08-31 - Survival ability word + Survivor subtype]
[Cohort anchor: cards/_characters/dsk-survival-archetype.md - Caveats section pre-named Savior of the Small]
other_candidates_considered: Etched Cornfield 258 -> dsk-unlucky-lands-cycle: already fully wired (frontmatter characters: pointer + node appears_on + dedicated node-body member paragraph). No edge needed - parent's flag was a verify-don't-write case and it verifies clean.
Bleeding Woods 257 -> dsk-unlucky-lands-cycle: same, already wired AND already carries a 1:1 visual-iconography Connections edge to 266-raucous-carnival from a prior pass. Verified clean.

Savior of the Small <-> Defiant Survivor 1:1 affective-pole edge (protect / fight / flight): a real connection but it would be a duplicate edge pointing at the absent center the cohort node already IS. Correctly subsumed by the stack attach. If a Discrete Lair is ever built on this cohort, the protect-fight-flight affective spectrum is bundle why_it_fits prose, not a card-to-card edge.
